title: LR Schedule Visualizer
tagline: Feel why Transformers need warmup — sliders for every schedule
summary: Four schedules, one canvas. Flip between step decay, exponential, cosine annealing, and warmup+cosine. Drag peak LR, warmup fraction, and cycle length. See the training-time LR curve and overlaid loss curves for each schedule — and exactly why cold-starting at peak LR diverges modern architectures.
highlights: Switch between four schedule shapes; watch LR over training steps in real time.
Drag peak LR, warmup fraction, and total steps — each slider moves the curve live.
Overlay two schedules on one plot to compare.
See the effect on a toy loss surface — warmup+cosine converges; cold-start Adam on Transformer diverges.
Read the PyTorch one-liner for the currently configured schedule.
